generated_oml:
// Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedControllerActingComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller commanding thrust on the 1/10‑scale vehicle."
]

instance SteeringServoMotorActingComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Servo motor for lateral steering actuation on the vehicle."
]

// Physical Sensing Components
instance WheelEncoderSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wheel encoder or speed measurement unit providing ego vehicle speed."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering column angle sensor delivering steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoUST110LX_LiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑110LX LiDAR providing raw point clouds for clustering."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435i_DepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera supplying depth images for sensor fusion."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

// Data Transmitted
instance SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelEncoderSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST110LX_LiDAR
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435i_DepthCamera
]

instance DBSCANClusteredDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DBSCANClusteringModel
]

instance ObjectTrackingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom KalmanFilterTrackingModel
]

// Data
instance SpeedMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Speed data for vehicle, used for ACC and monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data for vehicle orientation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data for obstacle detection."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data used in sensor fusion."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance DBSCANClusteredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clusters of LiDAR points indicating obstacles after DBSCAN."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData DBSCANClusteredDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTrackingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Kalman‑filtered object tracks derived from LiDAR points."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackingDataTransmitted
]

instance ACCFollowingSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Desired vehicle speed computed by ACC controller."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted
]

instance PresentationRenderingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D rendering data of vehicle state and surrounding tracks."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData DBSCANClusteredDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateRecordData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical vehicle state data stored for reporting."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportGenerationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTrackRecordData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical object track data stored for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportGenerationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackingDataTransmitted
]

// Models
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm processing raw LiDAR point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFEEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking of detected objects from LiDAR clusters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFEEnabler
]

instance ACCControllerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC controller computing following speed per ISO 15622."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance PresentationRenderingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Presentation model for rendering 3D visualization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFEEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that aggregates sensor data for monitoring services."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler executing ACC computation on remote server."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadService
]

instance ACCRemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote management of ACC system."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCRemoteManagementService
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler handling generation of performance reports."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataTranslationFEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Functional Entity serializing and unit‑converting data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCRemoteManagementService
]

instance DataPreProcessingFEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Pre‑Processing Functional Entity for raw LiDAR point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadService
]

// Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time dashboard displaying vehicle state, projected path, and surrounding object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightACCBehaviorAnalysis, Insight3DVisualization
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote computation of ACC controller calculating desired following speed."
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightACCNavigationAnalysis
]

instance ACCRemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC enabling activation, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionToggleACCMode, ActionAdjustDesiredSpeed, ActionTriggerEmergencyBrake
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating time‑series reports of vehicle state and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionGenerateReport, InsightPerformanceReports
]

// Insights
instance InsightACCBehaviorAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of ACC speed following behavior and obstacle avoidance."
]

instance Insight3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D rendering of vehicle pose, projected path, and surrounding object tracks."
]

instance InsightACCNavigationAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed ACC navigation results including desired speed and braking decisions."
]

instance InsightPerformanceReports : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance reports detailing ACC behavior and vehicle telemetry."
]

// Actions
instance ActionAdjustDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust the desired set speed for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActionToggleACCMode : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActionTriggerEmergencyBrake : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking action via electronic speed controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActionGenerateReport : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate performance reports of ACC behavior."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Environment
instance VehicleTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment containing all physical and virtual components of the 1/10‑scale vehicle digital twin."
    base:contains WheelEncoderSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, HokuyoUST110LX_LiDAR, IntelD435i_DepthCamera,
                VedderElectronicSpeedControllerActingComponent, SteeringServoMotorActingComponent,
                MonitoringEnabler, ACCComputationEnabler, ACCRemoteManagementEnabler, ReportGenerationEnabler,
                DataTranslationFEEnabler, DataPreProcessingFEEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin publishes ACC‑derived control commands—desired speed to the Electronic Speed Controller, steering velocity to the steering servo, and optional emergency braking commands—over Wi‑Fi using ROS 2 topics, packaged by the Data Translation Functional Entity and delivered to the vehicle’s on‑board Jetson."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system is required to maintain end‑to‑end network latency of ≤100 ms from vehicle to DT entity and to synchronise internal clocks across entities with an accuracy of ≤100 ms, per requirements R7 and R8."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An ISO 23247‑aligned constellation with a Physical Twin Entity on the vehicle, a Digital Twin Entity achieving ACC computation and data management, a User Entity providing 3D visualization and control, and a Cross‑System Entity performing data translation; entities communicate over Wi‑Fi via ROS 2 (DDS) ensuring real‑time data flow."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design/development (DT software defined and mapped to ISO 23247 architecture), Manufacturing (physical vehicle built and instrumented), and Operation (DT running in real‑time for monitoring, remote management, and computation offloading of ACC). The DT represents the vehicle in its operated state."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity ensured by using well‑known algorithms (DBSCAN, Kalman filter, ISO 15622 ACC controller). Validation achieved through real‑time monitoring dashboards, report generation, and comparison against vehicle telemetry. Latency constraints (≤100 ms) serve as a safety‑critical validation metric; clock synchronization provides event ordering guarantees."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between physical twin and DT is via Wi‑Fi; ROS 2 middleware facilitates inter‑entity communication and inter‑entity communication over the network; a Data Translation FE serialises and aligns messages. No mention of specific TCP/UDP payloads or NTP, but ROS 2 uses DDS over transport."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "DT services hosted on a remote compute server (cloud or edge) receiving sensor data from the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano; the Physical Twin runs on the vehicle’s onboard hardware; the User Entity (web UI) can be hosted locally or on a web server accessed via the internet."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Architecture follows ISO 23247 (reference architecture for digital twins); ACC controller complies with ISO 15622; communication relies on ROS 2 middleware (DDS) which is an open standard; data processing algorithms follow standard machine‑learning/statistical methods (DBSCAN, Kalman)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical constraints include maintaining ≤100 ms end‑to‑end latency, synchronising clocks to ≤100 ms, and ensuring human‑in‑the‑loop control. No explicit security mechanisms are described, but the system’s safety is addressed by the latency and synchronization requirements."
]
